message:
feat(tests): add E2E tests for HTML export visual validation

Add 27 comprehensive E2E tests covering:
- Structure validation (no separate tool articles, badges in headers)
- CSS validation (glassmorphism, color variables, popovers, responsive)
- JavaScript validation (popover functionality, keyboard navigation)
- Accessibility validation (ARIA labels, semantic HTML, interactive badges)
- Format-specific tests (Claude, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, edge cases)
- Export option variations and self-contained validation

All tests use the message_grouping fixtures and verify the complete
export pipeline produces valid, accessible, well-styled HTML.

Implements br-2ebr: Task 7 - E2E Test Script for HTML Export

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
